Eric Frossard · Defense · 2026 NHL Draft Profile · Scouting Report .... Eric Frossard is a Defense playing for Guelph in the OHL. Currently ranked NA #151 on the consensus board for the 2026 NHL Draft. Eric is a prospect to watch for teams with strong development pipelines and patience for a longer NHL timeline.
